title: T-020 — SCN-011c PIN Change Self-service wizard (3-step) (06-a)
prompt:
# T-020 — SCN-011c PIN Change

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-003c, §6 D8
UX: prototypes/design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:253-258 §3.4
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:58-112 (label pin_screen, reused)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver the 3-step self-service PIN change wizard (Wpisz obecny PIN → Wpisz nowy PIN → Potwierdź nowy PIN), invoked from SCN-settings 'Zmień PIN'. Calls POST /api/scanner/pin/change (T-008).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/change/page.tsx` 3-step indicator + reused numpad pattern.
2. Server Action posts { old_pin, new_pin } to /api/scanner/pin/change; success ⇒ green success banner 'PIN zmieniony pomyślnie.' + router.push('/scanner/settings').
3. Inline policy-violation handling identical to SCN-011b.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/change/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/change/change-form.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/pin/change/change.action.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-011c-pin-change.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the wizard renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:58-112` (pin_screen reused) + UX §3.4, then it has a 3-step indicator above the same 6-dot+numpad pattern with 'Wróć' button — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
2. Given step 1 captures the wrong old PIN and the server returns 401, when the response arrives, then the wizard shows inline error 'Niepoprawny obecny PIN' and stays on step 1 with cleared dots
3. Given all three steps succeed, when the API responds 200, then a success banner 'PIN zmieniony pomyślnie.' is shown and the user is redirected to /scanner/settings

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-011c-pin-change.test.tsx asserting parity + wrong-old-pin error + success path before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-011c-pin-change'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip old-PIN verification
- Do not log entered PIN values
- Do not redirect away from /scanner/settings on success without showing the success banner

pipeline_inputs.description: Self-service PIN change 3-step wizard (old → new → confirm) wired to /api/scanner/pin/change.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) 3-step indicator above reused numpad block.
2) Same 6-dot indicator + 3×4 numpad as SCN-011.
3) Wrong old PIN keeps user on step 1.
4) Policy violation on new PIN behaves like SCN-011b.
5) Success banner before redirect to /scanner/settings.
out_of_scope: Do not implement first-time setup here (T-019)
Do not implement forced rotation banner here (handled by /api/scanner/session sliding refresh)
Do not implement P2 flows here: transfer-order (TO) creation, replenishment, cycle-count, inquiry full traceability — P1 stubs only
Do not implement offline queue write-path here (P2); P1 keeps offline-safe scan buffer + indicator only
acceptance_criteria: Given the wizard renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/login.jsx:58-112 reused + UX §3.4, then it has the 3-step indicator, same 6-dot+numpad pattern and 'Wróć' button — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given step 1 captures the wrong old PIN and server returns 401, when the response arrives, then inline error 'Niepoprawny obecny PIN' is shown and the wizard stays on step 1 with cleared dots

Given all three steps succeed and API responds 200, when redirect happens, then a 'PIN zmieniony pomyślnie.' banner is shown and the user is sent to /scanner/settings. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED: write scn-011c-pin-change.test.tsx asserting parity + wrong-old-pin + success path before implementation
For UI parity, capture 390x844 screenshots and Playwright trace/video artifacts; attach artifact paths in closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
risk_red_lines: Do not log entered PIN values
Do not redirect without showing success banner
Do not bypass scanner.* permission namespace when wiring server actions
Do not regress operator-friendly touch targets (>=48dp) or mobile viewport 390x844 evidence
cross_module_dependencies: 02-settings: PIN policy, locale, scanner device defaults
